Forge

Vertical datasheet AI for CAD teams

Tell Forge the exact part number. It will look up the datasheet, parse the PDF, and generate a download-ready CAD bundle.

Type a part number to begin.
AI intake

What part are you working on?

Type a manufacturer part number. Forge will search for the datasheet, ingest it, and prefill the normalized part record.

Start with a part number. You can add a manufacturer hint if the name is ambiguous.
Searches the web first, PDF upload remains the fallback.
Export destination
What Forge outputs
  • Normalized part record with provenance.
  • Symbol, footprint, and STEP source files.
  • Vendor-neutral bundle for Altium and Cadence until native emitters land.
Parsed part record
Package dimensions
FieldValue (mm)
Body length—
Body width—
Body height—
Pitch—
Lead length—
Lead count—
Radiation data
FieldValue
TID—
SEE—
SEL—
QML/QPL—
Pin table
#NameTypeDescription
Normalized JSON
